enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Azhage Azhage expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, capturing the essence of longing for a beloved.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie for Azhage Azhage is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of this song?

The singer for Azhage Azhage is currently unknown.

When was this song released?

Azhage Azhage was released on March 9, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Azhage Azhage beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. It conveys a sense of nostalgia and romantic yearning, making it perfect for intimate moments. The lyrics reflect the deep connection one feels towards a beloved, evoking feelings of warmth and affection. This melody serves as a soothing backdrop for anyone reminiscing about love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhage Azhage is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With its heartfelt lyrics and soothing rhythm, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into the enchanting world of Album and let the magic of this track sweep you off your feet.
stanzaMeanings: I love you, and I am following you like a dog.
I think of you every day, oh my dear, oh my dear.
There is no one like you in this world who has captured my heart.
Oh beauty, oh beauty, my beauty, oh moon, oh moon, the entire moon.
Is it you who came in my dreams? Will you be my life if we are separated?
If you are in my heart, there is no need for anyone else.
You are enough for me, I will come to you, like a shadow, you must also say a word.
Is it you who came in my dreams? Will you be my life if we are separated?
Oh beauty, I will never be apart from you, I will never live without you.
Even if it is heaven or hell, I will come to you.
I will let go of my life to be with you.
Oh beauty, oh beauty, my beauty, oh moon, oh moon, the entire moon.
